{{Missing Info}}

==Gene Simulation==
Gene Simulation Trials can be done in the Computer.

===General===
The General Gene Simulation is an infinitely repeating simulation that can be attempted with any of the 6 forms. It gradually increases in power, and each level awards Travel Speedup +10m. in Addition, every 5th level awards B-tads, Reagents, and Evolution Chests.

===Special===
The Special Gene Simulation is a split between Form Genes and Special Genes. Form Genes are obtained during [[Evolutions|Gene Research]] and are necessary for upgrading Form Tiers. Special Genes are obtained from a variety of places, listed below. 

All of these can only be attempted by a certain Form, have a limited number of floors, and a variety of specific rewards each.

===Gene Value Packs===
[[Value_Packs#Gene_Value_Pack|Gene Value Packs]] can be purchased after certain milestones are met.

==Gene Simulation Trials==
{| class="wikitable"
!Trial!!Origin!!Form!!Total Levels!!Rewards
|-
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Ancient Apostle}}||Complete 5 "Collect Apostle Info" [[Nursery#Red-0|Chores]]||{{RewardIcon|Angel Form Icon}}||46||{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest|orange}}
|-
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Belrog}}||[[Fissure]] Shop, 1k {{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}} (Reach Depth 1,400)||{{RewardIcon|Demon Form Icon}}||15||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Lord's Tailbone|purple}}
|-
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Biochem Man}}||2nd Stage of [[Chichikaka#Begin_Friendship|Chichikaka]] Friendship||{{RewardIcon|Zombie Form Icon}}||18||{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest}}
|-
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Blakadin MKIV}}||[[Fissure]] Shop, 2k {{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}} (Reach Depth 13,000)||{{RewardIcon|Mecha Form Icon}}||25||{{RewardIconWithLink|Divine Order Chest|yellow}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Bogenian Trial}}||Shoot down 10 total objects with {{RewardIconWithLink|Incense|orange|Incense#Shooting_the_Sky}}.<br>This will give {{RewardIconGeneSegment|Alien, +5}}.||{{RewardIcon|Mecha Form Icon}}||50||{{RewardIconWithLink|Organ Chest}}
|-
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Bone Demon}}||[[Fissure]] Shop, 500 {{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}} (5 times) (Reach Depth 2,000)||{{RewardIcon|Demon Form Icon}}||25||{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Soul Chest}}
|-
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Book Demon}}||Share a book from the [[Bookshelf]] 5 times.<br>The 5 times can be a combination of monthly and weekly shares.||{{RewardIcon|Demon Form Icon}}||13||{{RewardIconWithLink|Expert Scroll|purple}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup}}
|-
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Cave Lord}}||[[Fissure]] Shop, 1k {{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}} (Reach Depth 2,895?)||{{RewardIcon|Zombie Form Icon}}||15||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Copperbeard}}||[[Fissure]] Shop, 500 {{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}} (Reach Depth ?)||{{RewardIcon|Mecha Form Icon}}||10||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest}}
|-
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Dark Elf}}||[[Fissure]] Shop, 1k {{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}} (Reach Depth 1,500)||{{RewardIcon|Angel Form Icon}}||15||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Mahakala's Offering|orange}}
|-

|-
|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|Flying Man}}||Shoot down 5 total objects with {{RewardIconWithLink|Incense|orange|Incense#Shooting_the_Sky}}||{{RewardIcon|Angel Form Icon}}||1||{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Universe Energy Cube|orange}}

|{{RewardIconGeneSegment|HIV}}||[[Badge Shop]], 50 {{RewardIconWithLink|Badge}}||{{RewardIcon|Demon Form Icon}}||10||{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}

'''Simulation:''' Titanian<br>
'''Form:''' Mecha<br>
'''Floors:''' 20<br>
'''Rewards:''' Nebula Chests;{{RewardIconWithText|Singularity Crystal}} x3; {{RewardIconWithLink|Air Hawk|orange|Rocket#Robots}}<br>
{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
|+Titanian
